channel.title: SCP Cosplay suggestions
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "SCP Cosplay suggestions"

item.title: Re: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded: Hmm… Good suggestions I will look into 049-j Thank you!

item.title: Re: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded:
Well, SCP-049 is the obvious choice. Relatively simple: robe, gloves, mask, optional pimp stick. 049-j is similar.

You could paint some scary tattoos on yourself, grab a sword, and say you’re 076.

2331 could work, though it’s specifically Halloween related so that might be too on the nose.

Most other humanoids to my knowledge would be difficult to pull off, since they either look completely human or not human enough to cosplay without prosthetics or something.

item.title: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded:
So in my country there is no Halloween but a holiday later in the year called Yom Kipur (יום כיפור)
and at that holiday you dress up as anything you want and generally celebrate in school, work, parties etc… So for this year i wanted to cosplay as a humanoid SCP of course but I don't know which one. Send me suggestions and I will pick the most interesting ones. Thanks!
